title: Medical Staff Credentialing and Privileging Policy
description: Defines the process for initial appointment, reappointment, and temporary privileging of medical staff members in accordance with medical staff bylaws and NIAHO MS.1 requirements.

title: Infection Prevention and Control Policy
description: Establishes the hospital-wide infection prevention and control program including hand hygiene standards, isolation precautions, surveillance protocols, and outbreak response procedures.

title: Medication Reconciliation Policy
description: Defines requirements for medication reconciliation at admission, transfer, and discharge. Reconciliation must be completed within 24 hours of admission by a qualified pharmacist or provider.

title: Patient Assessment and Reassessment Policy
description: Defines the intervals and documentation requirements for initial and ongoing patient assessments, including post-surgical reassessment at 2-hour and 4-hour intervals.

title: Quality Data Reporting to Governance Policy
description: Establishes the requirement and process for regular reporting of quality and patient safety data to the governing body, including frequency, format, and documentation in meeting minutes.
